segments.text: Landing safely where the forward tilt can't punish
segments.original_text: 横強の差し返しが届かない位置に着地していて
本当になんか当たりませんね攻撃に

segments.text: Keeps pressing from positions where those hits can't land
segments.original_text: 絶対に当たらない位置から攻めを続ける
そしてボムから空中前

segments.text: With Donkey Kong's weight, it still won't KO, but
segments.original_text: ドンキーの体重ならまだ撃墜はしませんが

full_text: Landing safely where the forward tilt can't punish The attacks just aren't connecting Keeps pressing from positions where those hits can't land テシサムス Bomb into the fair With Donkey Kong's weight, it still won't KO, but That's the second time now Should survive it
corrections: 横鏡→横強 (forward tilt, kanji homophone きょう→きょう)
